package.name: FreeCAD Engineering Standards Library
package.description: 21 curated, verified standard engineering material-property cards (structural steels, stainless, aluminum, titanium, copper alloys, cast/ductile iron, one polymer, magnesium) that install into FreeCAD's own Material library. 15 are net-new to the FreeCAD ecosystem (including AZ31B, the first magnesium alloy in FreeCAD core or Supplemental-Materials); 6 are equivalent/corrected variants of an existing core card, included for their searchable standard designation. A prior-art pass against FreeCAD core removed 7 exact-duplicate cards before this release. Structural-profile and thread/fastener data are planned for a future release.
